# Generative AI events

**Status**: [Development][DocumentStatus]

Event snippets select from `.registry.events` by `name`. Weaver renders the
event header (name, status) followed by the attribute table. Each block is
rewritten in place between its `<!-- weaver ... -->` and `<!-- endweaver -->`
markers.

## Inference operation details

<!-- weaver .registry.events[] | select(.name == "gen_ai.client.inference.operation.details") -->
<!-- NOTE: THIS TEXT IS AUTOGENERATED. DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->
<!-- see test/fixtures/templates/registry/markdown/snippet.md.j2 -->
<!-- prettier-ignore-start -->

**Status:** ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue)

The event name MUST be `gen_ai.client.inference.operation.details`.

Describes the details of a GenAI inference operation, including the request parameters and token usage.

This event is opt-in and can be used to record input and output details independently from the inference span.

**Attributes:**

| Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`gen_ai.operation.name`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Required` | string | The name of the operation being performed. | |
| [`gen_ai.provider.name`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Required` | string | The Generative AI provider as identified by the client or server instrumentation. | `openai`; `anthropic` |
| [`gen_ai.request.model`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The name of the GenAI model a request is being made to. | `gpt-4` |
| [`gen_ai.usage.input_tokens`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | int | The number of tokens used in the GenAI input (prompt). | `100` |
| [`gen_ai.usage.output_tokens`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | int | The number of tokens used in the GenAI response (completion). | `180` |

---

`gen_ai.provider.name` has the following list of well-known values. If one of them applies, then the respective value MUST be used; otherwise, a custom value MAY be used.

| Value | Description | Stability |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `anthropic` | [Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) |
| `openai` | [OpenAI](https://openai.com/) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) |

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- END AUTOGENERATED TEXT -->
<!-- endweaver -->

## Evaluation result

<!-- weaver .registry.events[] | select(.name == "gen_ai.evaluation.result") -->
<!-- NOTE: THIS TEXT IS AUTOGENERATED. DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->
<!-- see test/fixtures/templates/registry/markdown/snippet.md.j2 -->
<!-- prettier-ignore-start -->

**Status:** ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue)

The event name MUST be `gen_ai.evaluation.result`.

Captures the result of evaluating a GenAI response for quality, accuracy, or other characteristics.

**Attributes:**

| Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`gen_ai.evaluation.name`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Required` | string | The name of the evaluation metric used for the GenAI response. | `relevance`; `groundedness` |
| [`error.type`](registry/attributes/error.md) | ![Stable](https://img.shields.io/badge/-stable-lightgreen) | `Conditionally Required` If the evaluation ended in an error. | string | Describes a class of error the operation ended with. | `timeout`; `java.net.UnknownHostException`; `500` |

---

`error.type` has the following list of well-known values. If one of them applies, then the respective value MUST be used; otherwise, a custom value MAY be used.

| Value | Description | Stability |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `_OTHER` | A fallback error value to be used when the instrumentation doesn't define a custom value. | ![Stable](https://img.shields.io/badge/-stable-lightgreen) |

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- END AUTOGENERATED TEXT -->
<!-- endweaver -->

[DocumentStatus]: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/otel/document-status
